mapper.select: SELECT * FROM manager ORDER BY create_at desc
SELECT * FROM phone_check_log ORDER BY create_at desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO phone_check_log( user_id, user_name, create_at) VALUES( #{user_id}, #{user_name}, now() )
INSERT INTO manager( user_id, user_pw, user_type, user_name, create_at, update_at ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{user_pw}, 200, #{user_name}, now(), now() )
